name: Corazon Mining Limited
summary: Corazon Mining Limited explores for and develops base metal resources in Australia and Canada. The company holds interest in the Lynn Lake nickel-copper-cobalt sulphide project located in Manitoba, Canada. It also holds interest in the Mt Gilmore cobalt-copper-gold sulphide project located in northeastern New South Wales. The company was formerly known as Xanadu Resources Limited and changed its name to Corazon Mining Limited in June 2010. Corazon Mining Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
